steps.text: We've tuned into an ancient radio drama mid-episode. A voice says: 'The airlock was empty... and yet, the sandwiches were GONE.' Recording for the captain.
The drama continues: the detective suspects the robot. The robot suspects the detective. The sandwiches remain at large. This is riveting, Captain.
Finale: it was the airlock itself. Sentient the whole time. Hungry the whole time. The crew is shaken. Five stars. We're finding the sequel.
